# tree-sitter-language-pack

> Universal code parser for 170+ programming languages with code intelligence, syntax-aware chunking, and polyglot bindings.

## About

tree-sitter-language-pack provides pre-compiled tree-sitter grammars for 170+ programming languages with a unified API for parsing, structure extraction, import/export detection, and intelligent code chunking for LLMs. Built in Rust with thin bindings for every major platform.

Parsers are downloaded on demand and cached locally — the initial package is small (~3MB) and parsers (~50KB each) are fetched automatically on first use.

## Organization

Part of the kreuzberg.dev ecosystem:
- **Kreuzberg** — Document intelligence: https://github.com/kreuzberg-dev/kreuzberg
- **html-to-markdown** — HTML to Markdown converter: https://github.com/kreuzberg-dev/html-to-markdown
- **tree-sitter-language-pack** — Universal code parser (this repo): https://github.com/kreuzberg-dev/tree-sitter-language-pack

## Links

- Website: https://kreuzberg.dev
- Documentation: https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev
- Discord: https://discord.gg/xt9WY3GnKR
- Contact: naaman@kreuzberg.dev

## Key APIs

- `init(config)` — Configure and pre-download parsers
- `download(languages)` — Download specific parser libraries
- `get_language(name)` — Get a tree-sitter Language (auto-downloads if needed)
- `process(source, config)` — Extract code intelligence (structure, imports, exports, comments, symbols, chunks)
- `parse_string(language, source)` — Parse source code into a syntax tree
- `available_languages()` — List locally available languages
- `manifest_languages()` — List all 170+ available from remote manifest
- `ProcessConfig` — Configure which analysis features to enable and chunking parameters
- `PackConfig` — Configure cache directory and languages to pre-download

## CLI

The `ts-pack` CLI bundles all 170+ parsers into a single static binary:
- `ts-pack download [languages]` — Download parser libraries
- `ts-pack parse <file> --language <lang>` — Parse source code
- `ts-pack process <file> --all` — Run full code intelligence pipeline
- `ts-pack list --manifest` — List all available languages

Install: `curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kreuzberg-dev/tree-sitter-language-pack/main/install.sh | bash`

## Available From

Rust (crates.io), Python (PyPI), Node.js (npm), Ruby (RubyGems), Go (pkg.go.dev), Java (Maven Central), C# (NuGet), Elixir (Hex.pm), PHP (Packagist), WebAssembly (npm), C FFI, CLI (Homebrew, Docker)

## Supported Languages

173 languages including: Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Rust, Go, Java, C, C++, C#, Ruby, PHP, Swift, Kotlin, Scala, Haskell, Elixir, Erlang, Lua, R, Julia, Dart, Zig, Nim, and 150+ more.
